description_en: The first transmitted head, “الْحَكِيم,” appears without a displayed numeral.
impact_en: The recovered ordinal layer treats this as head 1 while preserving the witness’s lack of a displayed numeral.

description_en: The witness ends with a blank terminal display-total line written as “١٠ - ٩”.
impact_en: The terminal line is preserved as a display total only and is not treated as an additional head.

description_en: Because the transmitted block begins with an unnumbered first head and ends with a blank terminal total line, the displayed numerals do not by themselves encode the full later-Madani 109-head sequence.
impact_en: The dataset stores recovered later-Madani ordinals together with witness display numbers where present.
